proposals.title: Integration of MWS AI Agents Platform for Visual Agent Assembly
proposals.what_we_have_now: Current system relies on manual coding and configuration for agent creation.
proposals.what_is_new: MWS AI Agents Platform allows visual assembly of AI agents without programming.
proposals.why_it_matters: Reduces barrier to entry for non-technical users and speeds up agent deployment.
rollout_plan: Pilot integration with a small team
proposals.risk: Potential learning curve for existing team members.

proposals.title: Adoption of BOHM for Hierarchical Attribution in Compound AI Systems
proposals.what_we_have_now: Current attribution methods rely on Shapley-based approaches, which may not work with third-party APIs.
proposals.what_is_new: BOHM provides zero-cost hierarchical attribution for compound AI systems.
proposals.why_it_matters: Improves transparency and accountability in multi-component AI systems.
rollout_plan: Test with a subset of components

proposals.title: Exploration of NeuroNL2LTL for Natural Language to LTL Translation
proposals.what_we_have_now: Limited tools for translating natural language to formal logics like LTL.
proposals.what_is_new: NeuroNL2LTL combines neural translation with formal verification for reliable LTL translation.
proposals.why_it_matters: Enhances formal verification accessibility for safety-critical systems.

summary_md:
### **Proposals Digest 2026-05-25**

1. **MWS AI Agents Platform Integration** (🟡 consider) - Visual assembly of AI agents, reducing technical barriers. [Read more](https://habr.com/ru/companies/ru_mts/articles/1038936/).
2. **BOHM for Hierarchical Attribution** (🟡 consider) - Zero-cost attribution for compound systems, improving transparency. [Read more](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22866).
3. **NeuroNL2LTL Exploration** (🟢 info) - Combines neural translation with formal verification for LTL. [Read more](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22874).

*Summary: Focus on enhancing agent creation and system transparency with new capabilities.*
